description: The shopping sidebar on the right refreshes its content, displaying a new set of clothing items from Cotton On.
frame_description: Rome2Rio search results page for Rome to Palermo. A shopping sidebar is visible on the right, and its content updates with new product cards.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor over a blue jacket in the shopping sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over a shopping card for a blue jacket on the right side of the screen.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor over a tan hoodie in the shopping sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor moves down to hover over a different shopping card, this one for a tan hoodie.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor over a white t-shirt in the shopping sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor moves further down the shopping sidebar to hover over a white t-shirt card.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor back over the blue jacket in the shopping sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor moves back up to the top of the shopping sidebar.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor back over the tan hoodie in the shopping sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor moves back down to the tan hoodie card.

description: Sophia moves the cursor to the left side of the screen and hovers over the first search result (Train).
frame_description: The cursor is now on the left side of the screen, hovering over the top travel result which shows a train route.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor over the second search result (Flight).
frame_description: The cursor moves down to the second result, which is a flight option.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor over the third search result (Bus).
frame_description: The cursor moves down to the third result, a bus option.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor back over the first search result (Train).
frame_description: The cursor moves back up to the train result.

description: Sophia pauses briefly before moving the cursor to the filter section.
frame_description: The cursor remains still for a moment over the search results.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor over the 'Schedules - Departure' header.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the text header for the schedules section.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor over the 'Sort Departure Time' dropdown menu.
frame_description: The cursor is over the sorting dropdown menu.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor over the 'Stops' filter dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor is over the stops filter dropdown.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor over the 'Duration' filter dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor is over the duration filter dropdown.

description: Sophia hovers the cursor over the 'More filters' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'More filters' button.

description: Sophia continuously moves the cursor over the search results list while discussing the trade-offs between train, flight, and bus travel with Jayde.
frame_description: The cursor moves back and forth between the different travel options on the left as the participants talk.
